description_long: This is a sturdy bed frame featuring a classic panel design with a high headboard and a lower footboard, both accented by wooden tops. The frame is painted in a light, neutral color, while the tops of the headboard and footboard are finished in a contrasting natural wood tone. The bed has a slatted base made of evenly spaced wooden slats, providing support for a mattress. The legs are short and slightly tapered, giving the bed a stable and elevated stance. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and subtle decorative paneling on the footboard and headboard. No mattress or bedding is present, leaving the slatted support structure fully visible.
description: A classic panel bed frame with a high headboard, lower footboard, and visible wooden slats, finished in light paint with natural wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high headboard, lower footboard, and the full width of the slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the slatted support system, and the contrasting wood tops on both headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and footboard, with the wood accent on top clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slatted base and the bed's overall rectangular structure.
